description: Using Quickbooks with the time clock information makes payroll take a couple of minutes, allowing me to get done quickly and correctly. Employees like the ease of use, so they actually clock in and out! The cost of the program has risen, but still well worth the time savings.
author: Kevin C.
pros: As an employer I wanted an easy to use time clock. This is and has been such an easy set up and managed program I could not recommend it more highly. The ability to assign managers for other employees has made my payroll day so much easier, which is a big time saver, making payroll a breeze.
cons: Printing options. There is not a smooth way to print audit logs. Having that additional report would be a great help for documentation of changes made after the fact.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: We absolutely love using OnTheClock for our business! The app is extremely user-friendly and makes it so easy for my employees to clock in and out without any confusion. They can easily keep up with how many hours they’ve worked and see exactly how much they’re making per hour, which helps with transparency and accountability. On my end as the owner, I love that I can quickly see who is currently clocked in and at work. It keeps everything organized and gives me peace of mind knowing attendance and time tracking are handled efficiently. Highly recommend to any business owner looking for a simple and reliable time tracking solution!
author: STEPHANIE M.
cons: I DONT THINK THERE ARE ANY CONS. I DO HAVE A FEW THINGS I WANT TO LEARN MORE ABOUT BUT THAT IS ON ME.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I have had no choice, our employer went from Gusto to On the clock to save money. Many employees have complained about the product, but we have to work with what we have.
author: Amy G.
pros: I personally do not care for this product. The only pro is to track hours and request time off. There are no other options available.
cons: I had used Gusto previously and like how the app was user friendly, along with tallying hours (annually), the pto requests were easier to access and submit, and the messages in the message center do not get sent to my administrator as mentioned on website.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The folks that helped with the conversion and initial setup were fantastic and timely with their work. They communicated well and within 2 days we were active.
author: Steve P.
pros: Converting from QuickBooks Online was a breeze. Running first payroll was flawless Contractor setup was a bit confusing, but it is great now My G/L posting is down to 4 entries instead of 12-15
cons: Reporting is pretty limited. It works for me since I only post the weekly PR entries on Quickbooks Desktop. I have not been through a Workers Comp audit with it, but that will be in the fall. My employees don't always tell me about a missed punch, so I have to watch those numbers.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, this has been a pretty positive experience. The app works as it should, and any errors have been user errors (like forgetting to clock back in).
author: Allyson H.
pros: I love that there is both an app and a website so I can get the most accurate punches. I also really like that I can see my hours and my accruing time off. It's really simple to use, too.
cons: I don't think the location services are the best that they can be. It often thinks I am just a few hundred feet or so from where I am (which isn't a huge deal because my company isn't strict on that).
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I use it to clock in and out of work everyday, holding me accountable while I work from home, so I know my employers feel assured I'm at my desk each day .
author: Nick L.
pros: The ease of use, simple, straightforward and effective. I really enjoyed the fact that I could use this every day!
cons: Nothing. No Notes. It works very well. Honestly I really enjoy that I can keep track of when I'm starting and finishing work each day
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I like it, no big issues
description: Been good. No real issues other than the lagging but again that doesn't happen often. I like it better than other apps I have used.
author: Summer B.
pros: The ease of the apps use. It was very easy for me to navigate. I also like it uses GPS so if I forgot to clock if I remember when I get to my car, I can still clock out.
cons: Sometimes it is slow upload the punch clock. This makes it difficult to beat the clock sometimes but it doesn't happen often
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It’s been very straight forward to figure out and I like that I can check my hours easily on the timesheet and see when my pay window is near.
author: Andrea M.
pros: It’s very easy to use as a new member of my staff and I haven’t required any training to figure it out. It’s a great way for me to record my hours and not loose track.
cons: Sometimes the web page takes a while to load. I have to press multiple times to go to the time sheet.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A GREAT APP OR PROGRAM FOR BIG COMPANYS
description: i really enjoy it makes admins job easy and quicker for employees to clock in and out after a long day
author: JOSHUA M.
pros: its easy and quick best clock out and in method for a company i think alot of companys should use it makes time sheets easy and fast
cons: its hard for the ios for iPhone to connect but easier for Samsung i tried to get to the app on app store took really long to pull up and wouldnt connect to my company
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall very happy with the app. Super easy to use for anyone who is inexperienced as well. Glad my job has this app
author: Stephanie G.
pros: Super easy and efficient to use! Clocking in and out could not be easier. I love that it calculates your total worked hours on its own after every shift
cons: Range of clocking in and out is far from my office I have to walk somewhere else to do so. Range should be bigger
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Our overall experience has been excellent. To narrow it down to one word, excellence in the platform's functionality and excellence in customer service. Excellence in customer focus. Excellence in cost to value. Excellence in delivering on what their customers want and need.
author: Monica R.
pros: On the clock has the best customer support and help available. Making sure any issues are quickly resolved so they do not repeat. The platform is well-designed and easy to navigate without taking much time to learn. Our employees of all computer skill levels find it easy to use and have no problem navigating what they need to do. What you get for what you pay is significantly better priced than their competitors. It is secure and you can assign rolls as needed with permissions that match that role. It is one of the best time tracking platforms availible, and we have been using it for several years. We have not used the payroll function because we have an in-house system. Otherwise, we would use their payroll since it looks easy to use and navigate, just like the time clock.
cons: There isn't much to not like about On The Clock; the only thing I can think of is that the PTO could be a little more automated for renewals.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Overall on the clock is awesome. The previous application wouldn’t show you how many hours you worked till that week was over so being able to see it everyday is a great addition.
author: Nick Y.
pros: On the clock works great! It is very easy to use and there was no learning curve. I love how it shows you how many hours you worked the previous application we used did not. Works very well and have had no problems this far.
cons: The only thing that is a little different than what we used to use. I couldn’t find how you can leave a comment on the “punch” / time card like for when you don’t take a lunch. We’ve been using the conversations on the app to communicate this information. But I think it would make it easier to be able to do it when you punch out.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: USER FRIENDLY, EASY TO USE. SIMPLE APP THAT CAN BE USED ON A PC, IPAD, OR CELL PHONE. LIKE THE FACT IT PROVIDES A SUMMARY FOR EACH WEEK.
author: Justin W.
pros: EASY TO USE. CAN USE THE APP ANYWHERE AND IT ALLOWS ME TO CHECK THE LOCATION OF EMPLOYEES OVER THE ROAD.
cons: SOMETIMES IT DOES NOT RECORD PUNCH WHEN IT SAYS PUNCHED IN AND KEPT ME ON THE CLOCK ALL DAY, OTHER THAN THAT NO ISSUES.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, my experience with OnTheClock has been positive. It's a dependable platform with solid core features, helpful email notifications, and responsive customer support. While there’s room for improvement in a few areas, it has streamlined our time tracking and simplified our payroll process significantly.
author: Romina M.
pros: What I liked most about OnTheClock was how easy it was to set up and use—for both administrators and employees. The learning curve was minimal, making onboarding smooth and quick. Time tracking is accurate and reliable, and features like GPS verification and PTO tracking make managing employees’ hours much easier. The system also provides great value for money, especially for small businesses, offering powerful tools at an affordable price. I also appreciated the security features, like IP restrictions and login tracking.
cons: However, what I liked least was the mobile app's occasional glitches—it sometimes fails to register punches on the first try, which can be frustrating for remote workers. The scheduling tool is functional but could use more flexibility and options for more complex shift structures
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: WORKING WITH ON THE CLOCK MAKE ME CONNECT COUNTS AND CONTROL CORRECTLY WHAT EXACTLY THE AMOUNTS IS TO BE.
author: SULLAY K.
pros: EVERYTHING IS STEP BY STEP in all learning SECURITY values for EMPLOYEES Management PAYROLL Pay and Invoand LOGIN.
cons: PERSONAL Multiple programs are all working for all jobs and locations within the company and community
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Easy to Use, Efficient, and Wonderful Interface Even On Busy Work Days
description: Very user friendly and easy to monitor PTO and work hours. Very happy with clear interface. We work in a busy clinic and it's been easy to log-in and be able to clock-in and out without stress. I've used applications in the past that have been overcomplicated or had terrible accuracy. So happy we're using a program that's so stress free.
author: Marcy C.
pros: It's very efficient and easy to use. Very user friendly and even when I have forgotten to clock in, my supervisor easily fixed with quick turn around times.
cons: Possibly that there is no app options? But it could be that I'm not aware of it. We have to close out all of our schedulers to be able to access. So I would think having a GPS locked app on our phones would be easier clock-in option.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: GREAT EXPERIANCE. THE APP GIVES GOOD INSIGHT TO HOURS AND PTO REQUEST. YOU CAN CHECK YOUR PTO HOURS AND INPUT PTO
author: HANNAH R.
pros: ITS EASY TO NAVIGATE. IT WORKS FOR EVERYONE IN OUR COMPANY. WE USE IT OEVERYADAY. IT OFFERS GREAT INSIGHT ON YOUR HOURS AND TOTALS FOR THE DAY IT IS A GREAT APP
cons: SOMETIMES ITS A LITTLE SLOW. THIS COULD NOT BE THE PROBLEM WITH THE APP BUT PROBLY OUR INTERNET OVERALL ITS ALWAYS WORKING EASY
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Easy To Learn, Reliable, A Great Value & Consistent!
author: Erik R.
pros: The interface is quick & easy. There really isn't much of a learning curve. I haven't encountered any bugs or issues in the few months I've been a user. Payroll is easy to manage, as well as the taxes, and time tracking could not be any easier! The platform is safe, secure, and a great value for the price!
cons: The only thing I dislike about the website is the constant logging in and out, but I'm going to assume this is a security feature so I really can't complain!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very helpful for me to keep track of hours and mileage. I can go back and see what was entered so I can compare to my other mileage program to make sure it's accurate.
author: Denise S.
pros: I am able to not only keep track of my hours but also my mileage! It is so useful for me to be able to track my miles each day.
cons: I wish I could adjust the time myself, as I have forgotten to punch out. I realize this may be my company's settings, but I hate contacting HR to adjust my timeclock
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Kevin L.
pros: I liked OnTheClock for its user-friendly interface and reliable time-tracking features. It made managing employee hours straightforward and efficient.
cons: I found OnTheClock's reporting features somewhat limited, which made it challenging to generate detailed insights. Additionally, the interface felt a bit outdated compared to other tools I've used.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: The overall experience has been great. I feel like the system is fluid and works the way it should work.
author: Brandon F.
pros: The ease of use and the ability to clock in remotely at different locations on my personal and work phone
cons: Sometimes in the am the application/website takes a while to load up and clock in. Requiring managers to adjust clock in time
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: I like the app and desktop version. It is very easy to use and great for employees. They can even verify the hours.
author: Angela B.
pros: Its easy to use and set up. I also like that is has an employee login app on phones
cons: The GPS location doesn't always work very well. Sometimes you can be in your spot and still cant log in.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Best way to clock in and out!
description: Was very easy to login and it's very fast and straight to the point. I really like that I can see my hours right away.
author: Korey M.
pros: OnTheClock is very easy to use, I instantly was able to understand what to do, It took no time to set up. As soon as I pull up the web page I clock in and out within seconds
cons: I did not have one thing that I disliked about OnTheClock. Like I said it is very userfriendly and suggest all businesses use this.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Mary L.
pros: Easy to use, reliable, allows for mileage input. Very convenient. My company has salaried employees use it too.
cons: Nothing I can think of except that salaried saes persons do not have to clock in and out with other companies.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: In general, it is a good piece of kit for what we need it to do. It is pretty user friendly on both the companion app and the website.
author: Dan H.
pros: I like the ability to print all the timecards for the pay period with the separated by employee per page. There a a number of great export and print options available.
cons: I wish there was a more convenient way to switch between my login as manager and my login as an employee. When signed in as manager, I am not able to see my own timesheet, which I find frustrating.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
